UI展示数量只影响日志中心显示，不影响日志文件本身。: UI display count affects the log center only, not log files.
下次打开同一视频时恢复上次播放位置。: Restores the previous position when reopening the same video.
MissAV 有 5 秒盾，建议显式运行并手动过盾: MissAV has a 5-second shield; run visibly and pass it manually
下载失败后的自动重试次数。: Automatic retry count after a download fails.
下载目录、命名规则和打开行为: Download folder, naming, and open behavior
任务中断后尽量从已下载位置继续。: Try to continue from the downloaded position after interruption.
任务完成后自动打开文件或所在位置。: Automatically opens the file or its location when a task finishes.
使用应用内置播放器预览媒体内容。: Uses the built-in player to preview media.
保存采集结果和下载文件的位置，支持粘贴路径或手动选择文件夹。: Where crawled results and downloaded files are saved; supports pasted paths or folder selection.
保留周期、展示数量和错误追踪: Retention, display count, and error tracing
出现异常时自动复制追踪编号，便于排查问题。: Automatically copies the trace id on exceptions for troubleshooting.
切换配置中心和 WebUI 设置页的显示语言。: Switches the display language for the settings center and WebUI settings page.
单次网络请求等待时间，网络较慢时可适当调大。: Wait time for one network request; increase it on slower networks.
部分内容需要登录后才能访问，请检查平台认证状态。: Some content requires login. Check the platform authentication status.
登录后重新复制分享链接并重试。: After logging in, copy the share link again and retry.
登录后重新复制分享链接并重试任务。: After logging in, copy the share link again and retry the task.
确认网络连接正常，或尝试切换网络环境后重试。: Confirm the network connection is working, or switch networks and retry.
在配置中心提高请求超时和重试次数。: Increase request timeout and retry count in Settings.
请重新复制最新的分享链接并重试任务。: Copy the latest share link again and retry the task.
确认代理、DNS 和网络环境正常，必要时切换网络后重试。: Confirm proxy, DNS, and network settings are working; switch networks if needed and retry.
关闭正在播放或占用目标文件的程序后重试。: Close the program playing or using the target file, then retry.
尝试切换到有写入权限的保存目录。: Choose a save folder with write permission.
在日志中心按 Trace ID 过滤，定位同一任务的上下游日志。: Filter by Trace ID in Logs to find upstream and downstream logs for the same task.
同时执行的下载任务数量，数值越高对网络和磁盘压力越大。: Number of download tasks running at once; higher values increase network and disk pressure.
图片预览时不自动轮播。: Disables automatic rotation during image preview.
外观设置只影响界面显示，不影响下载任务。: Appearance settings affect the interface only, not download tasks.
并发、超时、重试和限速: Concurrency, timeout, retries, and speed limits
并发越高不一定越快，建议根据网络和磁盘性能调整。: Higher concurrency is not always faster; tune it for your network and disk.
应用启动时自动清理过期日志。: Automatically cleans expired logs on startup.
开启后图片下载也遵循普通并发数；关闭时图片批量使用轻量快速通道。: When enabled, image downloads follow regular concurrency; when disabled, image batches use the lightweight fast lane.
开启后跳过封面、图片等非视频资源。: When enabled, skips covers, images, and other non-video resources.
当前视频结束后自动播放列表中的下一项。: Automatically plays the next list item when the current video ends.
控制下载文件的命名格式，只能从预设模板中选择。: Controls downloaded file naming; choose from preset templates only.
控制日志中心前端最多展示的日志条数，避免大量日志影响界面性能。: Controls the maximum log rows shown in the log center to keep the UI responsive.
控制日志中心前端最大展示的日志条数，避免大量日志影响界面性能。: Controls the maximum log rows shown in the log center to keep the UI responsive.
播放设置只影响本地预览，不影响下载文件。: Playback settings affect local preview only, not downloaded files.
Web 端开始扫描本地媒体目录: Web started scanning local media folder
Web 端开始扫描本地媒体目录（异步）: Web started scanning local media folder (async)
下载失败：无法解析视频播放地址: Download failed: could not parse video URL
Frontend render exceeded the interactive: Frontend render exceeded the interactive budget; refresh cadence was relaxed
结束后播放下一项: Play the next item after ending
自动跟随操作系统的浅色或深色主题。: Automatically follows the operating system light or dark theme.
认证状态、爬取数量和代理入口: Auth status, crawl quantity, and proxy entry
认证状态、默认数量和代理入口: Auth status, default counts, and proxy entry
认证状态自动检测；代理仅对需要的平台开放。: Auth is detected automatically; proxy controls are exposed only where needed.
设置下载完成后的默认打开行为。: Sets the default behavior after a download completes.
设置下载完成且开启自动打开后的打开行为。: Sets the behavior used after a download completes when auto-open is enabled.
设置媒体文件默认使用的播放方式。: Sets the default playback mode for media files.
设置手动点击播放或预览时使用的播放器。: Sets the player used when manually clicking Play or previewing media.
设置日志中心默认关注的最低展示级别。: Sets the lowest default level shown in the log center.
该平台暂无可热加载的爬取数量配置: This platform has no hot-loadable crawl quantity setting
该平台暂无可热加载的默认数量配置: This platform has no hot-loadable count setting
调整筛选条件 或点击「刷新缓冲」重新加载日志: Adjust filters or click Refresh buffer to reload logs
超过保留期的旧日志可在后续清理策略中删除。: Old logs beyond the retention period can be removed by cleanup policy.
路径支持粘贴和选择；命名规则使用预设模板，避免非法文件名。: Paths support paste and folder picking; filename rules use presets to avoid invalid names.

Enter a keyword, share link, video/note link, profile link, or Xiaohongshu ID...
过期日志后续可清理: Expired logs can be cleaned later
选择或粘贴下载目录: Choose or paste a download folder
限制下载速度，选择“不限制”表示使用最大可用带宽。: Limits download speed; unlimited uses the maximum available bandwidth.
限制日志中心展示条数: Limit rows shown in the log center
集中管理下载行为、平台状态、播放体验、日志策略与界面外观: Manage downloads, platform status, playback, logs, and appearance in one place
State update is out of sync. Resyncing...
请输入主页链接、分享链接或合集链接: Enter a profile, shared, or collection link
前端连接尚未就绪，请稍后重试: Frontend connection is not ready. Try again shortly
文件不存在或已被删除: File does not exist or has been deleted
下载目录、文件命名和打开行为: Download folder, filename rules, and open behavior
下载目录、命名规则、打开行为: Download folder, filename rules, and open behavior
下载并发、超时、重试、下载策略: Concurrency, timeout, retry, and download policy
并发、超时、重试和下载策略: Concurrency, timeout, retry, and download policy
账号验证、爬取数量和代理入口: Account auth, crawl quantity, and proxy entry
播放器、断点续播和预览行为: Player, resume playback, and preview behavior
播放器、进度记忆和预览行为: Player, progress memory, and preview behavior
播放器、进度记录和预览行为: Player, progress memory, and preview behavior
保留策略、展示数量和错误追踪: Retention policy, display limits, and error tracing
保留策略、显示上限和错误追踪: Retention policy, display limits, and error tracing
日志留存、显示条数与错误追踪: Log retention, display count, and error tracing
路径支持粘贴和选择，命名规则使用预设模板，避免非法文件名。: Paths support paste and selection; naming rules use preset templates to avoid illegal file names.
UI 显示数量只影响日志中心显示，不影响日志文件本身。: The UI display limit affects Log Center only, not the log files.
前端渲染超过交互预算，已降低刷新频率: Frontend render exceeded the interactive budget; refresh cadence was relaxed
选择要注册到 Windows 默认应用的资源类型。Windows 可能会要求在系: Choose the resource types to register with Windows default apps. Windows may still ask for confirmation in Settings.
视频资源（mp4、mkv、avi、mov、webm 等）: Video resources (mp4, mkv, avi, mov, webm, etc.)
图片资源（jpg、png、gif、webp、bmp 等）: Image resources (jpg, png, gif, webp, bmp, etc.)
生效方式：注册成功后会立即影响之后的系统打开行为；若 Windows 拦截，程序: Effective after registration for future system opens. If Windows blocks it, the app opens Default Apps settings for confirmation.
暂时无法检查最新版本。: Could not check the latest version right now.
更新检测返回了无法识别的结果。: The update check returned an unknown result.
当前版本 {local_version} 高于最新 Release {lates: Current version {local_version} is newer than the latest Release {latest_version}.
更新前建议关闭正在运行的采集任务。当前只完成确认流程，下载和安装稍后接入。: Before updating, close running crawl tasks. This build currently only confirms the update; download and install will be added later.
自动下载和安装流程尚未接入。: Automatic download and installation are not connected yet.
当前只完成了版本检测与更新确认弹窗。: Only version checking and the confirmation dialog are connected right now.
当前只完成版本检测与更新确认，下载和安装流程尚未接入。: Only version checking and update confirmation are connected; download and installation are not connected yet.
本地版本与 GitHub 最新 Release 一致，无需更新。: The local version matches the latest GitHub Release. No update is needed.
通常表示你正在使用本地构建或预发布构建，无需更新。: This usually means you are using a local or prerelease build. No update is needed.
当前筛选结果中没有可复制的 Trace ID。: There is no Trace ID to copy in the current filtered results.
当前没有可导出的日志。: There is no log to export.
或点击「刷新缓冲」重新加载日志: or click Refresh to reload logs
外观设置会即时生效，并保存到本地配置。: Appearance changes apply immediately and are saved locally.
这通常表示你正在使用本地构建或预发布构建，无需更新。: This usually means you are using a local or pre-release build, so no update is needed.
